sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 41

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 41:1
items.html: (to the question) And you must know the rule there is in the growth of every Partzuf: the upper ones grow first in the discernment of the Kelim [vessels], and the opposite with the Lights — in them, the lower ones come first. Thus, if the Partzuf has only the Kli of Keter, the Light of Nefesh is drawn to it; and when it acquires the Kli of Hochma, the Light of Ruach comes to it — then the Nefesh descends into the new Kli of Hochma, and the Light of Ruach clothes in the Kli of Keter. Likewise, when it attains the Kli of Bina, the Light of Neshama comes to it; then the Neshama clothes in the Kli of Keter, the Ruach in the Kli of Hochma, and the Nefesh that was in Hochma descends into the new Kli of Bina it attained. Therefore, while ZA [Zeir Anpin] has only the Mochin of Yenika [suckling], which are Nefesh-Ruach, he has then only two Kelim, Keter and Hochma: the Ruach clothes in the Kli of Keter — and both are called HGT [Hesed, Gevura, Tiferet] — and the Nefesh clothes in the Kli of Hochma, and they are called NHY [Netzah, Hod, Yesod]. Therefore, at the time of Gadlut, when ZA attains AHP [Awzen, Hotem, Peh] of the discernment of Bina, which are new NHY, and acquires the Light of Neshama, the Neshama is found clothing in the Kli of Keter — the old HGT — and they have now become the discernment of HBD [Hochma, Bina, Daat], for the Kli of Neshama is the discernment of Rosh and HBD, as is known. And the Ruach now clothes in the Kli of Hochma, namely in the old Kelim of NHY, which have now become the discernment of HGT, for they became Kelim of the Ruach, which are called HGT. And the Light of Nefesh, which was at first in the old Kelim of NHY, now descends into the new Kelim of Bina, which are the new NHY. (p. 783, beginning "The Yesod in her")
